creator: Barilla
source_text:
We love a pasta recipe that takes us straight to the streets of Naples! 
Buon appetito! 🍝🇮🇹

Ingredients (serves 4):
320g Barilla Penne Rigate
400g Barilla Napoletana Sauce
2 tbsp extra virgin olive oil
1 red onion, sliced
1 celery stick, sliced
200g canned tuna in olive oil
80g Spanish olives, halved
2 tbsp flat leaf parsley

Method:
1. Bring a pot of salted water to a boil and cook the penne according to package instructions.
2. Drain and reserve 150ml of the cooking water.
3. Meanwhile, heat a skillet until hot, add the extra virgin olive oil, red onion and celery and sauté for 5 minutes until just soft.
4. Add the Napoletana sauce, salt and black pepper.
5. Stir in the tuna and olives and simmer for 1-2 minutes until the tuna is hot.
6. Add the penne and toss until coated, adding the pasta water little by little and cooking for 1 minute to get a creamy sauce.
7. Serve topped with the parsley.

#ASignOfLove #Barilla #Pasta

Add the penne and toss until coated, adding the pasta water little by little and cooking for 1 minute to get a creamy sauce.
